en: Wu Fan (b.1997) is a designer and Ph.D. candidate in Design at Hunan University of Technology. His work sits at the intersection of industrial design, sustainable innovation, and digital preservation of cultural heritage.

He earned his B.A. (2019) and M.F.A. (2022) from HUT, then joined Guangzhou University of Software as a faculty member (2022–2026). In September 2026, he returned to HUT to pursue a full-time Ph.D. in Design.

He has published {pubCount} papers in journals including PLOS ONE (SCI JCR Q2), Biomimetics (SCI JCR Q1), and Results in Engineering (EI, JCR Q2). His research spans grounded theory, biomimetic metamaterials, AIGC-aided design, and the modern transformation of traditional crafts.
zh: 吴凡，1997年生，湖南工业大学设计学博士研究生。在工业设计、可持续创新与文化遗产数字化保护的交叉领域中开展研究与实践。
2019年学士、2022年MFA硕士毕业于湖南工业大学。2022年6月入职广州软件学院任教，2026年7月离职，同年9月入学湖南工业大学攻读全日制设计学博士学位。
